meaning: int.表示惊讶,狼狈时所发的喊声
examples: Oops! I almost spilled the wine.
Oops, I shouldn't have said that.
Today they're saying, "Oops, we made a mistake."
And, oops, he also forgot to change the company name listed on several of his slides.
Instead, they ran all over the Hoyas and rubbed it in with outrageous dunks and alley-oops.
